case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. KATHRYN SASSER ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SASSER, KATHRYN DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-08-2019

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100061446), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED FEB-01-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SASSER, KATHRYN

DECLARATION RE: ACCEPTING COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS (TRANSACTION ID # 200003584) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200001328) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $276.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 200003584) AS TO DEFENDANT SASSER, KATHRYN

DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST AND ATTORNEYS FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 200003584) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SASSER, KATHRYN $828.00 PRINCIPAL, $276.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,104.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
